questions.question: Describe the purpose of the root login in a UNIX system and explain the differences between single and multi-factor root login methods.
questions.hint: Focus on the security implications of each method.

questions.question: What is the default root password in a fresh UNIX installation, and how can it be changed?
questions.hint: Specify the default password and provide at least one method for changing it.

questions.question: What are the consequences of a root login being compromised, and how can it be prevented?
questions.hint: Discuss the potential risks and provide at least one mitigation technique.
